abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Weighted Anchor
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a Voyage token. If it does so, this action receives a (fortitude).

triggers.name: Whirlpool
triggers.text: Enemy models within 1" of the target are placed within 3" of this model.

actions.name: Toss
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This may target friendly models. Target a model of lower Sz than this model.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 10" directly away from this model. If this move is interrupted, the target and all models in base contact with it must pass a TN 14 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Falling does not end this movement.

triggers.name: Skip Over the Waves
triggers.text: Remove a Voyage token from the target. When resolving, reduce the distance moved by 4". The target ignores terrain while moving.

actions.name: Heavy Torrent
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may declare the Toss action against the target, which increases its TN by +2.
actions.effects: When resolving that action, reduce the distance the target would be moved by an amount equal to the distance between this model and the target.
